Date:06/25/2026

Our team sympathizes with your frustrations surrounding our refund policy. For clarity, once you meet with a provider and an order is placed we are unable to refund or stop the order from fulfillment.   
   ### Initial Complaint

Date:06/15/2026

Type:Service or Repair Issues Status:Resolved More info## Complaint statuses [...] Resolved:The complainant verified the issue was resolved to their satisfaction. Unresolved:The business responded to the dispute but failed to make a good faith effort to resolve it. Answered:The business addressed the issues within the complaint, but the consumer either a) did not accept the response, OR b) did not notify BBB as to their satisfaction. Unanswered:The business failed to respond to the dispute. Unpursuable:BBB is unable to locate the business.    I purchased a prescription from them and followed the instructions as the doctor ordered. When it did not work I contacted the doctor and they told me that I would need to see an in person doctor. So I contacted customer support to get a refund since they advertise a 60 day money back guarantee and it had been less than 2 weeks. I [...] amount of money for the trial, then double the money the second time around without my consent or even a reminder. I contacted them constantly, with the same response, "No Refunds". I felt cheated twice. Once by choice, and the other, without. Image 28

results.title: Think twice before buying from these social media ads
results.content:
_Learn how to identify a fake website._

Before buying, do a quick online search. Google the website name with the words “complaints,” “reviews,” and “scam” to see what other customers are saying. Check the “About Us” or “Contact Us” information on the company’s website to see if they contain actual contact details for the business. If the only way to contact the company is through a form, this is a red flag.

Image 7: Close up of people using mobile smart phones - Detail of friends sharing photos on social media network with smartphone - Technology concept and cellphone culture with selective focus on right hand

### Apps of unknown origin: [...] ##### Do your research.

Before making a purchase, quickly search for the business in question. Do they have valid contact information? Don’t be fooled by professional photography or consumer reviews on their website. These can be lifted from other sites. CheckBBB Scam Trackerto see if others have been duped.

BBB Scam Tracker

##### Search for previous complaints.

Do a Google search of the business name followed by “complaints,” “reviews,” or “scam” or search BBB.org and see what pops up. If you find this business has cheated other people, steer clear.

Search BBB

##### Use good judgment. [...] ### Engaging ads and poor customer service:

This category covers a broad spectrum of complaints that BBB receives, from ads for beauty products to trendy clothing to kids' toys. The advertisements look great, and the products are often inexpensive. This means that consumers purchase without researching the website or the company behind it. However, weeks pass, and the products never arrive. When the buyers reach out to customer service, they get a vague answer or don't hear back.

_Learn how to identify a fake website._
